mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals that output is recovering and operating leverage is improving, causing investors to raise expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest available value was 95.3964 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO momentum does not produce higher subsequent 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals accelerating income loss and weaker household spending, leading investors to mark down near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest available value was 9.5 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is near zero and CPI inflation is subdued, discount-rate pressure is low and policy support dominates inflation risk, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 0.21 as of one month before the decision date
fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 214.459 as of one month before the decision date
regime_hint: zero-rate monetary easing with subdued inflation
failure_condition: Reject if periods satisfying the joint FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL trigger do not have positive average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the interaction term is insignificant at p > 0.10 in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales indicate that household demand is stabilizing and revenue expectations are improving, so positive 3-month RSAFS momentum produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest available value was 342138.0 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month momentum fails to beat negative RSAFS momentum by at least 25 basis points in average 20-day S&P 500 returns over rolling 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts breakout signals improving construction demand, credit transmission, and durable-goods spillovers, causing upward revisions to cyclical earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average after being below it for at least 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest available value was 532.0 as of two months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST breakout trigger is followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of triggered instances, or if triggered returns are not above unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production rises while payroll employment continues to fall, firms are generating more output with fewer workers, which raises margins and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest available value was 131692.0 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-up and PAYEMS-down state does not deliver higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than states where both series fall, or if its average return is negative in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: If CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains constrained near zero, real policy rates fall and inflation-risk premia rise, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 0.21 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and low FEDFUNDS trigger is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the triggered mean return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: After at least two consecutive quarterly declines in real GDP, equities begin discounting policy stimulus and inventory-cycle normalization before GDP improves, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 has declined for at least two consecutive quarters
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest available value was 11360.5 as of six months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if two-quarter GDPC1 contraction triggers are followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations, or if triggered returns underperform unconditional returns.
